requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Minimum Performance & Test Method (Moroccan appliance energy-efficiency rules; AMEE/Ministry)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——最低性能与试验方法（摩洛哥家电能效规则；AMEE/相关部委）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——最低性能與試驗方法（摩洛哥家電能效規則；AMEE/相關部委）

summary.en: Morocco operates an appliance energy-efficiency framework driven by its national energy-efficiency law and implementing texts, with the energy-efficiency agency AMEE (Agence Marocaine pour l'Efficacité Énergétique) and the relevant Ministry promoting minimum energy-performance and labelling for household appliances including refrigerators. Energy performance is measured against IMANOR NM standards adopting the IEC 62552 series (household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods), the same international test basis used in the EU and increasingly worldwide. The practical requirement for a refrigerator is that its measured energy consumption / efficiency be determined by NM IEC 62552-based testing and meet the applicable Moroccan minimum threshold, with the result feeding the energy label (see frigma-energy-002). Unlike the EU's precise EEI formula and tiered 2021/2023 thresholds under Regulation (EU) 2019/2019, Morocco's thresholds and class boundaries are set by national texts and should be confirmed for the current period with AMEE/IMANOR; the underlying IEC 62552 measurement method is, however, common ground.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥实行由其国家能效法及实施文本驱动的家电能效框架，由能效机构AMEE（摩洛哥能效署）及相关部委推动包括电冰箱在内的家用器具最低能效性能及标识。能效性能依据IMANOR采纳IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性与试验方法）的NM标准进行测量，与欧盟及全球日益采用的国际试验基础相同。对电冰箱的实务要求是：以NM IEC 62552为基础测试确定其实测耗电量/能效，并满足适用的摩洛哥最低门槛，结果用于能效标签（详见frigma-energy-002）。与欧盟在法规（EU）2019/2019下精确的EEI公式及2021/2023分阶段门槛不同，摩洛哥的门槛及等级界限由国家文本设定，应就当前阶段与AMEE/IMANOR确认；但底层IEC 62552测量方法为共同基础。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥實行由其國家能效法及實施文本驅動的家電能效框架，由能效機構AMEE（摩洛哥能效署）及相關部委推動包括電冰箱在內的家用器具最低能效性能及標識。能效性能依據IMANOR採納IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性與試驗方法）的NM標準進行測量，與歐盟及全球日益採用的國際試驗基礎相同。對電冰箱的實務要求是：以NM IEC 62552為基礎測試確定其實測耗電量/能效，並滿足適用的摩洛哥最低門檻，結果用於能效標籤（詳見frigma-energy-002）。與歐盟在法規（EU）2019/2019下精確的EEI公式及2021/2023分階段門檻不同，摩洛哥的門檻及等級界限由國家文本設定，應就當前階段與AMEE/IMANOR確認；但底層IEC 62552測量方法為共同基礎。

standards_or_laws: Morocco national energy-efficiency law and implementing texts on minimum energy performance and labelling of household appliances (administered with AMEE — Agence Marocaine pour l'Efficacité Énergétique — and the relevant Ministry)
NM standard adopting the IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (IMANOR national adoption; measurement basis for energy performance)
Applicable Moroccan minimum energy-performance thresholds / class boundaries — set by national implementing texts; confirm current values with AMEE/IMANOR

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades), which sets grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits, enforced by SAMR with the energy-labelling system administered by NDRC. The Chinese test method (GB/T 8059, aligned with the IEC 62552 series) shares the same international measurement lineage as Morocco's NM IEC 62552 adoption — so the raw measurement is broadly comparable, but the Chinese grade thresholds and class boundaries are calibrated to China's own framework and do not map one-to-one onto Moroccan thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由NDRC管理。中国试验方法（GB/T 8059，参照IEC 62552系列）与摩洛哥NM IEC 62552采纳同源于国际测量谱系——因此原始测量大体可比，但中国等级门槛及等级界限按中国自身框架校准，与摩洛哥门槛不能一一对应。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由NDRC管理。中國試驗方法（GB/T 8059，參照IEC 62552系列）與摩洛哥NM IEC 62552採納同源於國際測量譜系——因此原始測量大體可比，但中國等級門檻及等級界限按中國自身框架校準，與摩洛哥門檻不能一一對應。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test method (aligned with the IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: The measurement method is common ground (both descend from IEC 62552), but two gaps remain: (1) Threshold recalibration — a Chinese Grade 1/Grade 2 rating does not automatically map onto Morocco's minimum-performance threshold or label class; the IEC 62552 measured consumption must be evaluated against the applicable Moroccan threshold/class boundaries set by national texts, which should be confirmed for the current period with AMEE/IMANOR. (2) No EU-style EEI formula — Morocco does not apply the EU Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 EEI formula or its tiered 2021/2023 thresholds, so neither EU EEI values nor Chinese grades can be assumed compliant; the determination is against the Moroccan national threshold. Where the destination thresholds are not publicly fixed, the in-country importer and AMEE/IMANOR are the authoritative source for the current minimum-performance level a model must meet.
gap.zh: 测量方法为共同基础（两者均源自IEC 62552），但仍有两项差距：（1）门槛重新校准——中国1级/2级评定不自动对应摩洛哥的最低性能门槛或标签等级；须以IEC 62552实测耗电量对照由国家文本设定的适用摩洛哥门槛/等级界限进行评估，应就当前阶段与AMEE/IMANOR确认。（2）无欧盟式EEI公式——摩洛哥不适用法规（EU）2019/2019的EEI公式或其2021/2023分阶段门槛，因此欧盟EEI值与中国等级均不能默认合规；判定以摩洛哥国家门槛为准。在目的地门槛未公开固定之处，本地进口商及AMEE/IMANOR是型号须满足的当前最低性能水平的权威来源。
gap.zht: 測量方法為共同基礎（兩者均源自IEC 62552），但仍有兩項差距：（1）門檻重新校準——中國1級/2級評定不自動對應摩洛哥的最低性能門檻或標籤等級；須以IEC 62552實測耗電量對照由國家文本設定的適用摩洛哥門檻/等級界限進行評估，應就當前階段與AMEE/IMANOR確認。（2）無歐盟式EEI公式——摩洛哥不適用法規（EU）2019/2019的EEI公式或其2021/2023分階段門檻，因此歐盟EEI值與中國等級均不能默認合規；判定以摩洛哥國家門檻為準。在目的地門檻未公開固定之處，本地進口商及AMEE/IMANOR是型號須滿足的當前最低性能水平的權威來源。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a minimum energy-performance threshold applies — refrigerators must meet the applicable Moroccan minimum performance measured to the NM-adopted IEC 62552 series; thresholds/class boundaries set by national texts (confirm current values with AMEE/IMANOR)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: AMEE — Agence Marocaine pour l'Efficacité Énergétique

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco measures refrigerator energy performance to the NM-adopted IEC 62552 series — the same lineage as China's GB/T 8059 — but evaluates the result against Moroccan minimum-performance thresholds, not EU EEI or Chinese grades. A Chinese Grade 1/2 rating does not auto-qualify; recalculate against the applicable Moroccan threshold and confirm current values with AMEE/IMANOR and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥依据NM采纳的IEC 62552系列测量电冰箱能效性能——与中国GB/T 8059同源——但以摩洛哥最低性能门槛评估结果，而非欧盟EEI或中国等级。中国1级/2级评定不自动合格；须对照适用的摩洛哥门槛重新计算，并与AMEE/IMANOR及本地进口商确认当前数值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥依據NM採納的IEC 62552系列測量電冰箱能效性能——與中國GB/T 8059同源——但以摩洛哥最低性能門檻評估結果，而非歐盟EEI或中國等級。中國1級/2級評定不自動合格；須對照適用的摩洛哥門檻重新計算，並與AMEE/IMANOR及本地進口商確認當前數值。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Moroccan Appliance Energy Label (étiquette énergétique; AMEE/Ministry)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——摩洛哥家电能效标签（étiquette énergétique；AMEE/相关部委）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——摩洛哥家電能效標籤（étiquette énergétique；AMEE/相關部委）

summary.en: Morocco requires a national energy label (étiquette énergétique) for regulated household appliances including refrigerators, administered under its energy-efficiency framework with AMEE and the relevant Ministry. The label displays the appliance's energy-efficiency class and annual energy consumption derived from NM IEC 62552-based testing, in the format and language (Arabic/French) prescribed by the Moroccan implementing texts. Unlike the EU, Morocco does NOT operate a centralized pre-registration product database equivalent to EPREL — there is no EU-style hard online registration gate; instead the label and its supporting test evidence are presented through the importer and verified within the import-conformity / IMANOR pathway. The label class boundaries are set by Moroccan national texts and should be confirmed with AMEE/IMANOR for the current period, since they differ from both the EU rescaled A-to-G scale and the Chinese 1-to-5 grade scale.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥要求包括电冰箱在内的受管制家用器具加贴国家能效标签（étiquette énergétique），在其能效框架下由AMEE及相关部委管理。标签展示由NM IEC 62552为基础测试得出的器具能效等级及年耗电量，采用摩洛哥实施文本规定的格式和语言（阿拉伯语/法语）。与欧盟不同，摩洛哥不实行等同于EPREL的集中式预注册产品数据库——不存在欧盟式的强制在线注册门槛；标签及其支撑测试证据通过进口商提交，并在进口符合性/IMANOR路径中核验。标签等级界限由摩洛哥国家文本设定，应就当前阶段与AMEE/IMANOR确认，因其既不同于欧盟重新调整的A至G体系，也不同于中国1至5级体系。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥要求包括電冰箱在內的受管制家用器具加貼國家能效標籤（étiquette énergétique），在其能效框架下由AMEE及相關部委管理。標籤展示由NM IEC 62552為基礎測試得出的器具能效等級及年耗電量，採用摩洛哥實施文本規定的格式和語言（阿拉伯語/法語）。與歐盟不同，摩洛哥不實行等同於EPREL的集中式預登記產品數據庫——不存在歐盟式的強制線上登記門檻；標籤及其支撐測試證據通過進口商提交，並在進口符合性/IMANOR路徑中核驗。標籤等級界限由摩洛哥國家文本設定，應就當前階段與AMEE/IMANOR確認，因其既不同於歐盟重新調整的A至G體系，也不同於中國1至5級體系。

standards_or_laws: Morocco energy-labelling implementing texts (étiquette énergétique) for household appliances — administered with AMEE and the relevant Ministry
NM standard adopting the IEC 62552 series — measurement basis feeding the label values
Applicable Moroccan label class boundaries — set by national implementing texts; confirm current values with AMEE/IMANOR (no EPREL-style central pre-registration database)

summary.en: China's appliance energy labelling is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale and annual energy consumption, with labels administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is a national filing/record system for CEL but it is structured differently from any EU/Morocco scheme. The Chinese CEL graphic, scale, and language cannot serve as the Moroccan energy label.
summary.zh: 中国家电能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订），展示1至5级评级及年耗电量，标识由NDRC/SAMR下属中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；CEL设有国家备案/记录系统，但结构与任何欧盟/摩洛哥方案不同。中国CEL图形、评级体系及语言不能充当摩洛哥能效标签。
summary.zht: 中國家電能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂），展示1至5級評級及年耗電量，標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；CEL設有國家備案/記錄系統，但結構與任何歐盟/摩洛哥方案不同。中國CEL圖形、評級體系及語言不能充當摩洛哥能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label (CEL) framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — underlying energy-efficiency grade standard for the CEL

gap.en: Honest mapping of the no-EPREL point: Morocco requires an energy label but does NOT operate an EU-style EPREL centralized pre-registration database — there is no online registration that acts as a hard market gate. The exporter gaps are: (1) Produce a Moroccan-format energy label (correct class scale, Arabic/French, values from NM IEC 62552 testing) — the Chinese CEL cannot be reused; (2) Reclassify the model to the applicable Moroccan label class boundaries, which differ from both the EU A-to-G and Chinese 1-to-5 scales and should be confirmed with AMEE/IMANOR for the current period; (3) Route the label and supporting test evidence through the in-country importer and the import-conformity / IMANOR verification, rather than a self-service database upload. Where the current label format/thresholds are not publicly fixed, AMEE/IMANOR and the importer are the authoritative source.
gap.zh: 对无EPREL要点的诚实映射：摩洛哥要求能效标签，但不实行欧盟式的EPREL集中式预注册数据库——不存在充当强制市场门槛的在线注册。出口商差距为：（1）制作摩洛哥格式的能效标签（正确的等级体系、阿拉伯语/法语、取自NM IEC 62552测试的数值）——中国CEL不能复用；（2）将型号重新归类至适用的摩洛哥标签等级界限，其既不同于欧盟A至G也不同于中国1至5体系，应就当前阶段与AMEE/IMANOR确认；（3）将标签及支撑测试证据经由本地进口商及进口符合性/IMANOR核验提交，而非自助式数据库上传。在当前标签格式/门槛未公开固定之处，AMEE/IMANOR及进口商为权威来源。
gap.zht: 對無EPREL要點的誠實映射：摩洛哥要求能效標籤，但不實行歐盟式的EPREL集中式預登記數據庫——不存在充當強制市場門檻的線上登記。出口商差距為：（1）製作摩洛哥格式的能效標籤（正確的等級體系、阿拉伯語/法語、取自NM IEC 62552測試的數值）——中國CEL不能複用；（2）將型號重新歸類至適用的摩洛哥標籤等級界限，其既不同於歐盟A至G也不同於中國1至5體系，應就當前階段與AMEE/IMANOR確認；（3）將標籤及支撐測試證據經由本地進口商及進口符合性/IMANOR核驗提交，而非自助式數據庫上傳。在當前標籤格式/門檻未公開固定之處，AMEE/IMANOR及進口商為權威來源。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the appliance is within scope — a Moroccan-format energy label is required, with values from NM IEC 62552 testing; no EU-style EPREL central pre-registration database exists (label verified via importer / import-conformity / IMANOR). Confirm current format and class boundaries with AMEE/IMANOR
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: AMEE — Agence Marocaine pour l'Efficacité Énergétique

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Moroccan-format energy label is required for in-scope refrigerators, with values measured to NM IEC 62552, but Morocco has NO EU-style EPREL pre-registration database — the label is verified through the importer and import-conformity / IMANOR rather than an online gate. The Chinese CEL cannot be reused; reclassify to Moroccan label boundaries and confirm the current format with AMEE/IMANOR and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在范围内的电冰箱须加贴摩洛哥格式的能效标签，数值依NM IEC 62552测量，但摩洛哥没有欧盟式的EPREL预注册数据库——标签通过进口商及进口符合性/IMANOR核验，而非在线门槛。中国CEL不能复用；须重新归类至摩洛哥标签界限，并与AMEE/IMANOR及进口商确认当前格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在範圍內的電冰箱須加貼摩洛哥格式的能效標籤，數值依NM IEC 62552測量，但摩洛哥沒有歐盟式的EPREL預登記數據庫——標籤通過進口商及進口符合性/IMANOR核驗，而非線上門檻。中國CEL不能複用；須重新歸類至摩洛哥標籤界限，並與AMEE/IMANOR及進口商確認當前格式。
